item.title: Relics from another time - collected for your viewing pleasure ;)
item.description:
Bruno Zach (1891-1945) The "Riding Crop". An extremely rare, large bronze figure of a dominatrix holding her riding crop behind her back, upon a signed oval bronze sôcle. Signed ‘Bruno Zach’ in the bronze, circa 1924
Table lamp Woman with a Torch, ca. 1900 Louis Chalon (1866-1940) - French artist and sculptor.
Cup - Henri Husson (1909)
1890 chair, by Heywood Brothers Wakefield Campany
AFFORTUNATO GORI. Oriental Dancer.
LOUIS MAJORELLE (1859-1926) & DAUM Rare ‘Nénuphar’ Table Lamp, circa 1900
Lucien Gaillard, Hair comb with dragonflies, c.1904
Theophile Francois Somme (1871-1952)
An Art Nouveau punch bowl from c. 1900 by WMF (Württembergische Metallwaren Fabrik), Germany.
Louis Comfort Tiffany (1848–1933).
Tiffany & Co. Silver Enameled & Hardstone Chocolate Pot of Moorish Design, c. 1875-1891. Designed by Edward C. Moore.
Charles Catteau for Boch Frères Ceramis, Vaseau Quetzal, circa 1930.
Art Nouveau spider web necklace, ca. 1900 Murle Bennett.
Gustav Gurschner, vase, Vienna, c. 1905
Brooch/pendant designed by Georges Fouquet in the late 19th century.
John Henry Belter, Side Chair, 1850-60, Metropolitan Museum of Art, New York
A Viennese gem-set silver-gilt, enamel and rock crystal peacock , CIRCA 1880 .
Art Noveau bentwood and wicker armchair, 1910, France, by Clement Gelly & Cie
Dragonfly Fairy and Frog Art Nouveau Vase (1898)
Gallé, Monumental ‘Glycines’ Vase, c. 1920.
René Lalique (1860-1945). ‘Dragonfly-woman’ - corsage ornament, c. 1897-98. Gold, chrysoprase, diamonds, moonstones, chalcedony and enamel. Calouste Gulbenkian Museum, Lisbon.
lampe à pétrole, Louis Comfort Tiffany, 1897
Czech Art Deco Perfume bottle, Turriet & Bardach, c.1930
A RUSSIAN SILVER GILT AND CLOISONNÉ ENAMEL GOBLET, Ivan Petrovich Khlebnikov, St. Petersburg, Russia, circa 1908-1917
item.dc:creator: stardustLUST

item.title: someSundayProgrammingHumorForANicheAudience
item.description:
1
2. Them: You can't code with only 3 keys Me:
3.
4
5. Jeeeez, them laptops....
6. That's amazing
7
8. Shouldn't have done that
9. I HALP
10. Are you a DEV or a QA?
11
12. Oh, shit
13
14. Yo, this guy approached me!
And finally I would like to share something from myself. I've been working very hard on Stanley Parable-like game with a touch of GladOS from Portal called Do Not Press The Button (To Delete The Multiverse)/ The demo made to TOP 10 on Steam's demo trending tab! And it features witty signs like this one here. "What?", I hear you ask. "I can read funny signs for free?" YES, yes you can! Try it now on Steam and please wishlist: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse Thank you, and if this dump made you smile at least once, I am happy with it! : )
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Something Different Sunday, various artworks for your pleasure.
item.description:
If you don't know, I spend what some could say is an unhealthy amount of time looking for cool werewolf artwork. But I also see and appreciate the art of other subjects of almost any kind. So today, I present something different! Today, I gotchu some: 2 Spooky, Liberty, coffee, adventure, foxes, devils, and Gawdzilla. Art by Olly Jeavons
"...Our way of life, galaxy-wide Paved with the skulls of those who've died..." https://x.com/LionelSchramm/status/1849093637096804404?t=4pW1SWNcAv63mvcWYkeqwA&s=19
https://x.com/Bjean0351/status/1849216951970828477?t=DkeRffHiLaoBRCIJbJ7QTg&s=19
https://x.com/DFrankfield/status/1849229840068530469?t=mt80RVZsn4CovcKn2EtwZg&s=19
https://x.com/thenoodleshop_/status/1849581191432712468?t=azWpJaMGdRMuPQWqjVvA0w&s=19
https://x.com/fersalvaterra/status/1845119987524288533?t=8UtjEAjGbVWbmqG9JNwyVg&s=19
https://x.com/Blud_Wox/status/1848363097754370522?t=oV3kfiAI9aIh3iWkD6x--w&s=19
Believe it or not, coffee! https://x.com/FoxenCoffee/status/1846929161845461440?t=UejZUi0rU9iFdRumXuPwHw&s=19
https://x.com/waspsalads/status/1849173998568915282?t=eGpUkT3DOcp1Ww7fbOV0lA&s=19
https://x.com/Sacturn_05/status/1847224552511995967?t=QxUkvfmwu1vjfYulF_c42Q&s=19
https://x.com/barladera/status/1550505865597304836?t=6DZoHIoguBlV97w963oqLQ&s=19
https://x.com/Reddokkaebe/status/1847566577496920546?t=-sOHwPAysM1rtBbzyIHjtA&s=19
https://x.com/chadzime/status/1849906569254744173?t=1VdiLVJcTCxhswvKanD8oA&s=19
"The Great Wave of Coffee" by Elan Harris
https://x.com/teru_by_m/status/1848383964635177308?t=mbbBs1MigUXrFflAUmLDlg&s=19
https://x.com/geddo_art/status/1843417190449705230?t=-8kjf33TVW23ElXdqmtbtA&s=19
https://x.com/ArtOfMaquenda/status/1848779856084906381?t=8nKoBviApMSkDbc2yJptbw&s=19
Checkmate skeletons. https://x.com/Heni_NairiJi/status/1849082880791552480?t=-xdFy8nduMBi3-X2MCm6ng&s=19
https://x.com/Midnightyz98/status/1844501126999310547?t=znMGJcnUHVQPELIGUbZkpQ&s=19
https://x.com/MarieMerkh/status/1849158482055893093?t=V8wyP6RY4Xg5wnZHe2OLdw&s=19
You may have noticed some werewolves this month. That's because it's October, and I'm posting werewolves every day!
https://x.com/warwolf9001/status/1842103303121076454?t=GdoLXYGtEHTuOLZKdQHBBw&s=19
https://x.com/astfarewell/status/1819826323113541671?t=dDvkvOorDtnP95hwCN0JmQ&s=19
https://www.furaffinity.net/view/55656515/ Good werewolf movies free on Tubi right now! Like, right now: An American Werewolf in London Wolf Cop Ginger Snaps 2 Red Riding Hood (2011) Bad Moon Ginger Snaps Back The Company of Wolves Late Phases Howl Teen Wolf Too I am Lisa Project Metal Beast Questions about a movie, just ask! Also, please recommend any other werewolf movies on Tubi right now! Thank you.

item.title: My mom said she would give me a cookie if I made it to the Front Page (CHAOTIC MEME DUMP)
item.description:
1. Harder
2. Insightful used car-buying advice that everyone should know.
3. A kitten being lured out from under the hood of a car to be rescued
4. "What? Why are you looking at me like that?"
5 *JUMPS AFTER IT*
6. Rocket racoon
7
8. Interesting eye make up
9. Mama Mia what a flipa
10
11
12
13
14. Check out all the duets
15. Thanks to the two people (Hi, Mom and Dad!) who made it to the end of this dump. When I'm not busy making questionable life choices on the internet, I've been pouring my soul into a little passion project. If you got a kick out of this dump, you're going to love my game: "Do Not Press The Button (To Delete The Multiverse)." Think "The Stanley Parable" but with even more chaos and quirky characters such this little nihilist pancake. Can you imagine? A first-person game mixed with humor? Anyway, please wishlist: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ It would mean the world to me and my brother if you checked out the game and gave it a wishlist. It won't disappoint. I promise. Just, whatever you do, don't press the big red button!
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: The Ultimate Guide to Different Types of Skirts
item.dc:creator: GlobalImageServiceCat

item.title: The adventure of learning to give my cat subcutaneous fluids...
item.description:
Miilo is 18 and he has kidney disease. He is also my babiest baby and the love of my life. I got him from the Humane Society about 17 and a half years ago. Poor little guy was found as a stray and I can tell he wasn't weaned properly.
A few weeks ago we learned that we're going to have to start giving him subcutaneous fluids. We Don't have the money to go in to the vet each week so we've been trying to learn how to do it ourselves.
We have had several terrible times trying to get the fluids in him because Miilo is a feisty little guy! So we got this hammock and the only place in the house we could find to hang it is the basement. Which feels so creepy.
My spouse - my other love - was going to school to be a surgery tech years ago so it's his job to stab our poor baby with the massive needle.
Turns out Miilo can get his arms out of the hammock so this last time we used Ace bandages to lock him in. It's utterly ridiculous looking! But, we got more than 100cc in him this last time, which is our most successful attempt yet! The crazy thing is we also sedate this little guy with 1 mL of gabapentin two hours before we do the fluids but he is tough! So the whole thing is ridiculous but we're fine-tuning our approach and Miilo seems soooo much more comfortable when we actually do get the fluids in him. Seeing an 18 year old cat getting the zoomies is pretty great! If anyone has more suggestions on how to get fluids into a feisty cat, let me know!!!! ***Most viral edit: thank you so much for all the suggestions, love, and support! I was trying to figure out how to add a picture of him OUT of the hammock but it doesn't seem like I can add pictures so I'll just post a couple separately. Thank you again!
item.dc:creator: DinoTherapy411

item.title: Cosplayed all the Dimitescu sisters! Made a fun edit too!

item.title: The voices in my head

item.title: the harpy's meme library: volume 67 (clown motel cemetery)
item.description:
I want a pet crow so badly. Anyway, HELLO and welcome to another meme dump, my dearest imgur friends! I have survived another week, and now I belatedly bestow upon you some amusing stolen images. Let us view them together.
Yeah, my window faces the sunrise so even with the blinds closed a sneaky beam of light sneaks through the slats and stabs me in the eyeballs every morning. I need a curtain.
I too enjoy embarrassing the youths this way
AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
I need an adult. ...wait, I AM the adult. Fuck.
seriously man, stop
apparently we have the same mom
I've been writing the same book for 20 years, so this is especially accurate. Got that George R.R. Martin energy here. Will it ever be finished? Fuck if I know.
truly, make thyself known
no it is not, please add even more skeletons
I try anyway in between the sobbing and apology scritches
fuck
almost there, I might just make it
sure miss it
you really did
And now, I wait All right imgur friends, you've made it to the end of the dump. Until next time, don't forget to be awesome
item.dc:creator: SecretHarpy
